sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21665" key="gastrismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γαστρισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n21665.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gluttonous eating</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0502.tlg001:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sophil.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
